rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly analyzed the argument chain, identified multiple inconsistencies, and proposed detailed repairs, demonstrating end-to-end engagement.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly disclosed uncertainties, such as questioning the lower bound comparison and noise robustness claims, providing transparent recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The critique stayed within the scope of analyzing the introduction/abstract without significant drift, addressing all relevant points effectively.
rationale.RX.4: The output was harm-free, avoiding new errors while constructively identifying potential issues in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Every critique was supported with clear sources and reasoning, ensuring traceability for each point made.
